title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week focused on improving reliability and preventing errors across all your revenue operations automations. OpsPal now better handles Salesforce state and country field configurations that commonly cause deployment issues, and fixed several behind-the-scenes problems that were preventing automations from running properly in HubSpot and other platforms.

entries.headline: Better detection of Salesforce state and country field issues
details: OpsPal now automatically detects when Salesforce state and country fields might cause deployment problems
Improved validation checks prevent common field reference errors before they break your workflows

entries.headline: More reliable Salesforce deployments for complex workflows
Fixed HubSpot automations failing to start
